creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text: It's better if we get git-formatted patches. Do not add an attachment or patch while creating the bug report. Just create the report with the necessary synopsis. Then, create the git-formatted patch, especially with the PR. There are a number of git meta fields that can be set. If you do `git config—-add core.hooksPath .hooks`, then it will pop up a pre-formatted commit message that is self-explanatory.
